summary: Observed that Apache 443 /FireFlow/api/session proxies to aff-boot 1989 /aff/api/external/session, and both live paths returned the same HTTP 200 invalid-session JSON. Captured aff.conf, aff-boot ownership, and correlated Apache/AFF log clues for the next debugging seam.
follow_up_recommendations: If parity later breaks for a real session, correlate the exact timestamp across artifacts/httpd.ssl_access.tail.txt and artifacts/aff-boot.access.tail.txt first, then inspect AFF session handling around UserSessionPersistenceEventHandler, LegacyRestRepository, and UserSession::getUserSession.
If needed, repeat the same comparison with a known valid FireFlow session cookie to separate transport/proxy issues from downstream session resolution behavior.
